pack_info.description: A sample case pack demonstrating the modding format. Create your own!

cases.title: Cryptominer on Web Server
cases.description: A university web server is running unusually hot. CPU usage is at 100% but no one knows why. The sysadmin suspects a cryptominer was installed after a WordPress plugin was compromised.
